uplink.description: Onboard climate: battery 3.60 V, temperature 23.5 C, humidity 51.5 %
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds frame; expected values produced by running reference/upstream-codec.js (battery_voltage signed16*0.01, temperature signed16*0.1, relative_humidity u8*0.5) and mapping temperature->air.temperature, relative_humidity->air.relativeHumidity, battery_voltage(V)->battery.

uplink.description: Full I/O sweep: battery, outputs, negative temperature, humidity, digital/analog inputs, pulse count, MCU temperature
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds frame exercising every port-10 channel; expected values produced by running reference/upstream-codec.js. temperature 0xFFCE = -50 -> -5.0 C (two's complement); input_2 0x2710=10000 * 0.000001 = 0.01; input_3 0x03E8=1000 * 0.001 = 1; mcu_temperature 0x012C=300 * 0.1 = 30. Onboard temperature/humidity map to air.*; battery_voltage(V)->battery; digital outputs/inputs, analog inputs, pulse count and MCU temperature -> camelCase extras.
Synthetic. Header 0xAB 0xCD is not in the port-10 descriptor table; upstream reports this as a `data.error` ('Couldn't find header...'), this codec returns it via the {errors} contract instead.
